title: Work with Components in Figma
description: Components are popular in engineering and used for building user interfaces and games. Components are elements that you can use in designs when working with Figma. They help to make your projects have consistency. Adding the concept of components to a design tool makes the composition of complex designs more consistent and efficient. The great part of components in Figma is that Figma wants to make components easy to learn and use while still being powerful enough for advanced users. Learning about components will help you to build things faster and more consistently. By the end of this project you will be able to manipulate components in your projects easier.
